title: Round Number to Nearest Perfect Square

statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.inputFormat: Given an integer n, return the smallest perfect square that is greater than or equal to n.
statement.outputFormat: Return the smallest perfect square that is greater than or equal to n.
statement.notes: Note that a perfect square is a number that can be expressed as the square of an integer.

examples.explanation: The smallest perfect square greater than or equal to 13 is 16, which is the square of 4.
The smallest perfect square greater than or equal to 5 is 9, which is the square of 3.
The smallest perfect square greater than or equal to 999 is 1000, which is the square of 31.
